narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error preventing memory updates despite overall system health. Five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts in the memory architecture. My agent count remains at 19 with 5.8 hours uptime, but these missing prompts and the Neo4j failure present actionable gaps. I will prioritize applying the missing prompt templates from skill files and resolving the authentication issue to prevent future memory corruption.
